title: AWF tasks.json
description: Schema for `.awf/tasks.json`: a top-level array of task objects produced by prd-to-tasks and consumed by the AWF CLI.

what_to_build.description: Implementation intent and scope for the agent.

blocked_by.description: Zero-based indices of tasks that must complete first.

user_stories_addressed.description: PRD user story numbers this task satisfies.

comments.description: Agent or human notes; append-only style entries as strings.

commit_messages.description: Suggested or recorded commit messages for this task.

done.description: Whether the task is complete. The CLI does not treat all-done as loop completion without the sigil.
